leadText: Cucumber (Japanese: キュウリスライス Cucumber Slice) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A tart and bitter ingredient. Using it together with rich-tasting ingredients in a sandwich will really make the most of a cucumber's fresh-veggie aroma.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition 1.4.1 Distribution In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price S V $ 130 $ 32 Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A tart and bitter ingredient. Using it together with rich-tasting ingredients in a sandwich will really make the most of a cucumber's fresh-veggie aroma. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Deli Cioso , Aquiesta Supermarket (after earning 1 Gym Badge ) S V TM Peachy's (after earning 1 Badge ) S V ID Vending machines ( Terarium ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period S V Poké Times Sandwich Ingredients All December 12-17 to 18, 2022
